scrape-site.description: Orchestrates complete ecommerce website scraping workflow. Manages site tracker, coordinates Site Analyzer, Product Analyzer, Code Writer, Code Tester, and Cleanup agents via Playwright MCP.

site-analyzer.description: Analyzes ecommerce websites to detect platform, anti-bot protection, product discovery method, and optimal scraping mechanism. Uses Playwright MCP for browser-based discovery.

product-analyzer.description: Deep-dives into product pages to map all extractable fields (title, price, images, variants, structured data) with exact CSS selectors. Uses Playwright MCP for structured page analysis.

code-writer.description: Generates Python scraper code based on site and product analysis. Writes complete, executable scraper scripts with error handling, rate limiting, and logging.

code-tester.description: Tests generated scraper on sample products, validates field correctness (not just presence), and provides specific fix feedback. Feeds results back to code-writer for iterative fixes.

cleanup.description: Finalizes scraping workflow by moving scraper to scrapers/ directory, updating site tracker, archiving old output files, and cleaning workspace. Runs after every scrape.

skill-learner.description: Examines completed scrapes to identify new patterns worth learning. Proposes skill file additions or updates to make the system smarter. Always asks user before modifying skills.
